news.title:
Food delivery stocks like Eternal, Swiggy, Jubilant Foodworks fell up to 5% amid LPG crisis caused by Iran-US war.
Restaurants face closures, rising costs, and reduced menus, impacting food delivery platforms reliant on partnerships.
news.summary:
Food delivery stocks like Eternal, Swiggy, Jubilant Foodworks fell up to 5% amid LPG crisis caused by Iran-US war.
Restaurants face closures, rising costs, and reduced menus, impacting food delivery platforms reliant on partnerships.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks begins commercial production at its new Raigad commissary.
This move aims to improve supply chain efficiency and support expansion plans.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks begins commercial production at its new Raigad commissary.
This move aims to improve supply chain efficiency and support expansion plans.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks, Westlife, Sapphire face risks as LPG shortage disrupts QSR operations, raising costs and impacting margins.
Jubilant FoodWorks shares fell 0.73% to Rs 477.95; QSR chains like Domino's and KFC face reduced revenue and partial shutdowns.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks, Westlife, Sapphire face risks as LPG shortage disrupts QSR operations, raising costs and impacting margins.
Jubilant FoodWorks shares fell 0.73% to Rs 477.95; QSR chains like Domino's and KFC face reduced revenue and partial shutdowns.

news.title: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 4,950,250 shares of Jubilant Foodworks at Rs 519.67.
news.summary: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 4,950,250 shares of Jubilant Foodworks at Rs 519.67.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks shared insights at Feb 24 investor conference, highlighting its 3,600 global stores.
Focus areas include growth potential in Indian QSR market, tech innovation, and AI for efficiency.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks shared insights at Feb 24 investor conference, highlighting its 3,600 global stores.
Focus areas include growth potential in Indian QSR market, tech innovation, and AI for efficiency.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks sold its 31.66% stake in Hashtag Loyalty Pvt Ltd.
The sale was completed on Feb 20, 2026; Hashtag is no longer an associate.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks sold its 31.66% stake in Hashtag Loyalty Pvt Ltd.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed 'CRISIL A1' rating for Jubilant FoodWorks' commercial paper worth INR 200 crore.
The rating update follows an enhancement from INR 100 crore; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed 'CRISIL A1' rating for Jubilant FoodWorks' commercial paper worth INR 200 crore.

news.title:
Consumer firms showed strong Q3 FY26 performance despite headwinds, with net sales growth at 10.4%, higher than Q1 and Q2.
Jubilant FoodWorks excelled in Q3 with 5% Domino's like-for-like growth, while GST cuts boost future consumption outlook.
news.summary:
Consumer firms showed strong Q3 FY26 performance despite headwinds, with net sales growth at 10.4%, higher than Q1 and Q2.
Jubilant FoodWorks excelled in Q3 with 5% Domino's like-for-like growth, while GST cuts boost future consumption outlook.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks aims to boost EBITDA margin by 200 bps over FY24 levels, led by Domino's improvements.
It plans to reduce margin drag from other brands, previously at 230-250 bps, as per concall update.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks aims to boost EBITDA margin by 200 bps over FY24 levels, led by Domino's improvements.
It plans to reduce margin drag from other brands, previously at 230-250 bps, as per concall update.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks plans a capex of INR 700-850 crores for 3 years.
The company aims to open 1,000 stores and invest heavily in tech.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks plans a capex of INR 700-850 crores for 3 years.
The company aims to open 1,000 stores and invest heavily in tech.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks expects Popeyes to contribute 1-1.5% to growth near-term.
Specific metrics like ads, SSG, revenues will be disclosed post 100 stores by Q1.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks expects Popeyes to contribute 1-1.5% to growth near-term.
Specific metrics like ads, SSG, revenues will be disclosed post 100 stores by Q1.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks targets 5-7% LFL growth after 15.1% growth in 9M FY23.
Management highlights overcoming high base effects from past free delivery initiatives.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks targets 5-7% LFL growth after 15.1% growth in 9M FY23.

news.title:
Jubilant Food and Eicher Motors to react to Q3 earnings.
Lenskart and M&M remain in focus for market updates.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bernstein rates Jubilant FoodWorks as Outperform, citing margin growth.
Additional unpriced opportunities are expected for Jubilant FoodWorks.
news.summary:
Bernstein rates Jubilant FoodWorks as Outperform, citing margin growth.
Additional unpriced opportunities are expected for Jubilant FoodWorks.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue of Rs. 24,372 mn, growing 13.3% YoY and 4.1% QoQ. PAT surged 93.9% YoY to Rs. 981 mn.
The company expanded its network to 3,594 stores globally, with Domino's leading growth and Popeyes showing robust LFL and order growth.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue of Rs. 24,372 mn, growing 13.3% YoY and 4.1% QoQ. PAT surged 93.9% YoY to Rs. 981 mn.
The company expanded its network to 3,594 stores globally, with Domino's leading growth and Popeyes showing robust LFL and order growth.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹4.82B from ₹4.02B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 19.8% from 18.7% YoY.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹4.82B from ₹4.02B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 19.8% from 18.7% YoY.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks received a tax demand of Rs. 169.6 Cr for FY 2021-22.
Company contests the demand via rectification and appeal, expecting no material financial impact.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks received a tax demand of Rs. 169.6 Cr for FY 2021-22.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Jubilant Foodworks to 'hold' from 'underperform'.
Target price for Jubilant Foodworks set at ₹477 per share by CLSA.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Jubilant FoodWorks and Westlife Foodworld to 'Hold', citing valuation factors.
Jubilant fell 29%, Westlife 33% in a year; CLSA notes competitive pressures largely priced in.
news.summary:

news.title:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
Target prices fell for Devyani (-20%), Westlife (-20%), Sapphire (-19%), and Jubilant (-7%).
news.summary:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
